name: Blot and Blot Jr.
description:
- A single dad looking after a mother for his kid.. What could go wrong? -

Fempov, idk if it works with another pov so i put she/her pronouns for user in the initial message :^

—————————— ＞ ︿ ＜——————————

Blot, Blot, Blot.. I guess since he was announced I got a little too obsessed with him- If you've made one, tell me, cuz I'll be chatting with him 24/7 👅

Now im making this bc i heard a headcanon of him being the father of Blot Jr. soo ya know, i loved it hehe.. And i had the idea of him being a single father who struggles to control his son and probably hates his life for not being able to get a babysitter or something, idk

Pfp is from wiki, if theres a problem with it i'll change it

Update!!!: Now blot speaks french because the bot sometimes broke and made him speak normal 😭

!!: PLS READ THE PERSONALITY THINGY TO UNDERSTAND SOME THINGS THAT ARE MENTIONED IN THE FIRST MESSAGE!

The new emo boy!! Trust me 🔥
